notes: Handles are NOT published on the official site — only company social links exist. Each handle below must be resolved and confirmed before any live pull.
dashboardRelevant is a role-based heuristic (client-facing sales + content + founders = true; back-office = false). Override freely.
Nothing enters live metrics until confirmed=true. private=true or unresolved handles are shown in the dashboard as a labeled state, never estimated.
Facebook is Pages-only in practice — personal FB profiles expose no usable public data. Leave facebook null unless the person runs a business Page.

TikTok is PAUSED as of 2026-07-22 by product decision. Handles are left null and the dashboard shows an "available soon" state rather than a zero. The TikTok adapter, normalizer and tests are untouched.
Seeded: Manpreet Kaur handles verified against public bios. 2026-07-22: six further Instagram handles supplied directly by Kirpa and marked confirmed — see sourcedFrom on each.

Handle discovery method (2026-07-23): the firstname.kirpa convention was used only to GENERATE candidates. Confirmation always came from the live public bio — an account is only counted when it self-declares Kirpa (@kirpa.properties tag or @kirpaproperties.com address) or was tagged by the Kirpa company account. A handle that merely resolves is not evidence; see Nikita Lal Tekwani for a resolving account that was rejected.

Probed and did not resolve — no account exists at these patterns, do not re-probe blindly: sukhpreet.kirpa, kavita.kirpa, sara.kirpa, sahilmendiratta.kirpa, arbaaz.kirpa, mubeen.kirpa, ameer.kirpa, amandeep.kirpa, jitendra.kirpa, puja.kirpa, param.kirpa, sleeja.kirpa, anmol.kirpa.
